com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

Interface IXLibraryUIOperations

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXLibraryTabPage, IXLibraryTabPanel

    public interface IXLibraryUIOperations

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void initialize(IXLibraryTabNotifier notifier)
      During initilization of the tab panel, notifier is passed as a parameter.
      void refresh(IXApplicationContext libContext)
      With library context passed as a parameter the custom tab panel needs to refresh its panel with current selected object.
      void update(IXApplicationContext libContext)
      With library context passed as a parameter the custom tab panel needs to update the current selected object from its panel.

    • Method Detail

      • refresh

        void refresh(IXApplicationContext libContext)
        With library context passed as a parameter the custom tab panel needs to refresh its panel with current selected object. This can be found using getSelectedObjects on libContext This method is automatically called by library during library data refresh
        Parameters:
        libContext - IXApplicationContext

      • update

        void update(IXApplicationContext libContext)
        With library context passed as a parameter the custom tab panel needs to update the current selected object from its panel. Current Selected object can be found using getSelectedObjects on libContext This method is automatically called by library during library data update
        Parameters:
        libContext - IXApplicationContext

      • initialize

        void initialize(IXLibraryTabNotifier notifier)
        During initilization of the tab panel, notifier is passed as a parameter. Custom tab panel needs to call edited() on notifier whenever there is a data modification
        Parameters:
        notifier - IXLibraryTabNotifier
